system.effect: The psyker manipulates the biomass of his foe, weakening muscles and leeching vitality. The target suffers -10 to Strength and Toughness for the duration of the power. If Strength or Toughness reach 0, the target is helpless.

description.value: The psyker reaches out with his mind and saps the physical vitality from his foe, leaving them weakened and feeble. The target suffers a -10 penalty to both Strength and Toughness characteristics. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the penalty increases by -10.
